title: Sub-a-thon
description: Minecraft but every sub does something to your game
body:
[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/twitch4j/) By default the mod will try to start the integration when the server starts (single player world and dedicated servers). Before you start the integration you have to put your channel name at the configs. With your channel name set all you have to do is join your Single Player world or type `/subathon start` If you wish to, you can change the messages with a resourcepack. **Please note that the connection takes some time to establish, and subs/bits during the startup period won't be counted!** ‎
Documentation

The documentation is still being built!

  • Modifier internal value calculation: increment * multiplier
  • Modifier display value calculation: internal value / multiplier
    • Effect increment: Used to control the modifier and the displayed value
    • Effect multiplier: Used to control only the modifier

  • Current supported Modes:
    • Jump
    • Super Jump (Supper: affects all living entities)
    • Speed
    • Slowness
    • Health
    • Super Health (Supper: affects all living entities)
![](https://i.ibb.co/yphNcXz/fabric-only-banner.png)
